deep_dive.title: Data Flow Control: Data Safety Policies for AI Agents
deep_dive.abstract: Agents increasingly generate SQL, orchestrate pipelines, and automate data analysis on behalf of users. While recent work improves query correctness, correctness is not safety. A query may be semantically valid yet violate regulatory, privacy, or business constraints that govern how data may be combined and released. We argue that enforcing such constraints is fundamentally a data infrastructure problem.   This paper introduces Data Flow Control (DFC), a framework to declaratively specify and guarantee policy enforcement over tuple-level data flows within a DBMS query. A key challenge is defining a policy language that is optimizer-invariant yet efficient to enforce at scale. We formalize data safety as aggregate predicates over provenance monomials and present Passant, a portable query rewriting layer that enforces DFC policies without materializing provenance. Across five DBMS engines -- DuckDB, Umbra, PostgreSQL, DataFusion, and SQLServer -- Passant achieves ~0% overhead and outperforms alternatives by orders of magnitude. As a result, Data Flow Control is the first step towards moving data safety from prompts and post-hoc checks into the data infrastructure. Data Flow Control is available open source at https://github.com/dataflowcontrol/data-flow-control.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: data safety policy enforcement for AI agents, ensuring compliance with regulatory and privacy constraints
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向AI智能体的数据安全策略执行，确保合规与隐私
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向AI智能体的数据安全策略执行，确保合规与隐私
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向AI智能体的数据安全策略执行，确保合规与隐私
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Data Flow Control (DFC) introduces a framework to declaratively specify and enforce data safety policies over tuple-level data flows in DBMS queries generated by AI agents, preventing unsafe data combinations.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: AI智能体生成的SQL查询可能语义正确但违反数据安全约束。本文提出数据流控制(DFC)框架，在数据库层面声明式定义并强制执行基于元组级数据流的安全策略。通过定义策略语言和优化器无关的推理引擎，DFC在规模化部署中高效保障数据合规，防止隐私泄露和违规数据组合。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: AI智能体生成的SQL查询可能语义正确但违反数据安全约束。本文提出数据流控制(DFC)框架，在数据库层面声明式定义并强制执行基于元组级数据流的安全策略。通过定义策略语言和优化器无关的推理引擎，DFC在规模化部署中高效保障数据合规，防止隐私泄露和违规数据组合。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: security measures for LLM based autonomous agents

quick_skim.title: ZERO-APT: A Closed-Loop Adversarial Framework for LLM-Driven Automated Penetration Testing under Intelligent Defense
quick_skim.abstract: LLM-driven automated penetration testing agents are typically evaluated against static targets that neither detect nor respond to attacks, so their behavior under intelligent defense remains untested. The causal consistency of multi-step attack chains likewise hinges on unstable LLM reasoning, and agent decisions remain opaque to human analysts. These three shortcomings, in realism, consistency, and auditability, are usually patched in isolation. We present ZERO-APT, a turn-based attacker-defender-judge framework that addresses them within a single architecture. For realism, ZERO-APT embeds a configurable LLM Defender that consumes Sysmon telemetry and detects attacks in real time, exposing the attacker to a live opponent rather than a passive target. For consistency, three architectural mechanisms move causal consistency from unstable LLM reasoning into enforced system architecture: separation of planning from execution, multi-dimensional ReAct feedback, and a hard-constraint-filtered action library. For auditability, a dedicated Judge agent adjudicates each round, maintains global state, and emits structured post-hoc CTI reports that make every decision traceable. We evaluate a Windows Server 2022 post-exploitation prototype across five scenarios with three Defender configurations. ZERO-APT reaches 79\% attack success rate (Aurora 22\%, PentestGPT 39\%), a Causal Consistency Score of 0.860 (Aurora 0.930, Claude Code 0.520), and end-to-end decision auditability through structured CTI reports. We release the benchmark to support evaluation of penetration agents under intelligent defense.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: LLM Defender component in penetration testing framework for intelligent defense
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 渗透测试框架中的LLM防御者组件用于智能防御
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 渗透测试框架中的LLM防御者组件用于智能防御
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 渗透测试框架中的LLM防御者组件用于智能防御
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: ZERO-APT introduces a closed-loop adversarial framework with an LLM Defender that consumes telemetry to detect attacks, enhancing realism in LLM-driven penetration testing.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对LLM驱动的渗透测试代理在智能防御下行为未知的问题，提出ZERO-APT，采用轮次制攻击者-防御者-裁判架构，嵌入可配置的LLM防御者，通过Sysmon遥测实时检测攻击。该框架提升了测试的真实性、一致性和可审计性，为评估LLM智能体安全措施提供了逼真的环境。
